ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car */,
  "yr_mfr" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture of the car */,
  "fuel_type" INTEGER /* Fuel type of the car (1 for petrol, 0 for diesel, etc.) */,
  "kms_run" INTEGER /* Mileage of the car in kilometers */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the car */,
  "times_viewed" INTEGER /* Number of times the car listing has been viewed */,
  "body_type" INTEGER /* Body type of the car (0 for sedan, 1 for SUV, etc.) */,
  "transmission" INTEGER /* Transmission type of the car (0 for manual, 1 for automatic) */,
  "assured_buy" INTEGER /* Assured buy status (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "registered_state" INTEGER /* State where the car is registered */,
  "source" INTEGER /* Source of the car (0 for direct, 1 for broker, etc.) */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car make */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "car_availability" INTEGER /* Availability status of the car (0 for not available, 1 for available) */,
  "total_owners" INTEGER /* Total number of previous owners of the car */,
  "broker_quote" INTEGER /* Quote provided by the broker */,
  "original_price" INTEGER /* Original price of the car when new */,
  "car_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the car (1 to 5) */,
  "fitness_certificate" INTEGER /* Fitness certificate status (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "emi_starts_from" INTEGER /* EMI starts from amount */,
  "reserved" INTEGER /* Reservation status (0 for not reserved, 1 for reserved) */,
  "warranty_avail" INTEGER /* Warranty availability status (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (unique identifier for each car) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the car */,
  "interior_color" TEXT /* Interior color of the car */,
  "engine_capacity" REAL /* Engine capacity in liters */,
  "number_of_doors" INTEGER /* Number of doors on the car */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "service_history" TEXT /* Service history details */,
  "inspection_report" TEXT /* Inspection report details */,
  "accident_history" TEXT /* Accident history details */,
  "next_service_due" TEXT /* Date when the next service is due */,
  "next_inspection_due" TEXT /* Date when the next inspection is due */,
  "ownership_history" TEXT /* History of previous owners */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty expires */,
  "is_certified_pre_owned" INTEGER /* Whether the car is certified pre-owned */,
  "is_financed" INTEGER /* Whether the car is currently financed */,
  "is_leased" INTEGER /* Whether the car is currently leased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_body_type FOREIGN KEY ("body_type") REFERENCES body_types ("body_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_transmission FOREIGN KEY ("transmission") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_make_id FOREIGN KEY ("make_id") REFERENCES makes ("make_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_registered_state FOREIGN KEY ("registered_state") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_fuel_type FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car make */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the car make */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car make */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_types" (
  "body_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each body type */,
  "body_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the body type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Customer's gender */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (email, phone, etc.) */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (individual, business, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotes" (
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quote */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car the quote is for */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broker who provided the quote */,
  "quote_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the quote */,
  "quote_date" TEXT /* Date the quote was provided */,
  "quote_status" TEXT /* Status of the quote (pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "quote_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the quote expires */,
  "is_financed" INTEGER /* Whether the quote includes financing */,
  "emi_term" INTEGER /* Term of the EMI (in months) */,
  "down_payment" INTEGER /* Down payment amount */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the quote was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the quote was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES brokers ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brokers" (
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broker */,
  "broker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the broker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the broker */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the broker */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the broker works for */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Broker's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Broker's gender */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the broker record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the broker record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broker_id")
)
